prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约8985名→6591名→11927名→11666名→7007名，波动幅度较大。2023年出现明显后移（11927名），2025年大幅回升至7007名，为近五年最低位次（最好成绩），显示该校在吉林省理科考生中吸引力回升；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年53人、2022年56人、2023年57人、2024年60人、2025年62人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划增至68人（较2025年扩招约9.7%），扩招幅度较为明显，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65区间，属于中上水平211高校；2026年高考周期声誉文件中未出现河海大学相关负面舆情，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，未见明显报考关注异常升温或降温信号；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档记录；水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程A，环境科学与工程A，均为该校王牌学科，与招生专业高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，水利类专业虽非大众热门但行业认可度高；吉林省2026年高考总报名约110868人，较2025年物理类80421人略有减少（估算2026物理类约79800人），考生规模小幅下降；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角地区，对吉林省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在吉林省招生占比约1.5%（2025年），非主要生源省份，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅回升至7007名的强势表现、2026年扩招约9.7%带来的竞争加剧效应、以及吉林省考生总数略有下降的缓和因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约7464名，区间6964–7964名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 8985 → 6591 → 11927 → 11666 → 7007, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable drop (11927), but in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 7007, the lowest ranking (best performance) in the past five years, indicating a recovery in attractiveness among Jilin science (physics category) candidates. The enrollment plan for Jilin science (physics category): 53 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 62 in 2025, showing a gradual annual expansion. The 2026 plan increases to 68 (about 9.7% increase from 2025), a relatively significant expansion, theoretically intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 63rd, with recent rankings stable in the 60–65 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents, no negative public opinion related to Hohai University appeared, and the school's reputation remains stable. Douyin popularity ranks 52nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and no obvious abnormal increase or decrease in application attention. There are no records of admission gaps in historical submission anomalies. Water Resources Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, all of which are the school's flagship disciplines, highly related to the enrollment majors, and strongly attractive to candidates interested in these directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular in society. Although water resources majors are not widely popular, they have high industry recognition. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin college entrance examination is about 110,868, slightly decreasing from 80,421 in the 2025 physics category (estimated 2026 physics category about 79,800), with a small decline in candidate scale. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin is about 1.5% (2025), not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 7007, the intensified competition effect from the 2026 expansion of about 9.7%, and the mitigating factor of a slight decrease in the total number of Jilin candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7464, with a range of 6964–7964.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6964–7964, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Water Resources Dayu class, Electrical, Computer) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safe choices. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<6964), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Water Resources Dayu class and high-score majors like Electrical Engineering. For rankings near the lower limit (>7964), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1574 → 1589 → 1360 → 1590 → 1905, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, it moved forward to 1360 (best in recent years), and in 2025, it significantly moved backward to 1905 (worst in recent years), with a cumulative backward shift of about 545 positions over the past two years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) at this university in Jilin Province: 8 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 6 (a 25% reduction compared to 2025), which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition and potentially moving the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 63rd by Soft Science, with stable comprehensive strength. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents, no negative public opinion about Hohai University appeared. Its Douyin popularity ranks 52nd (relatively hot), with moderate exposure. No abnormal admission records, overall reputation stable. Hohai University has few liberal arts majors and no directly corresponding A-class disciplines. However, the university's overall engineering background has limited impact on liberal arts students' application decisions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social recommendation, accounting/finance/auditing are differentiated and wait-and-see, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of Jilin Province college entrance exam registrants is approximately 110,868, with an estimated history category of about 31,043, basically flat with 2025's 31,071. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and the Yangtze River Delta region has some appeal to Jilin liberal arts candidates, but it is not a major influencing factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has significantly moved backward to 1905, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 25% eases competitive pressure, and the total number of candidates is basically flat, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1569, with a range of 1287–1851.
